overall.description: Gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald agent in a suit exploring a luxury train car interior with ornate wood paneling and red velvet furnishings, then exiting to a lush outdoor garden with decorative lighting and bamboo fencing, eventually approaching a crowded social gathering near a parked train car.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury train bedroom with canopy bed

events.description: approaching the red canopy bed with rose petals scattered on it

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow train corridor toward a bedroom area with a red canopy bed

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead toward the bedroom area

entered.detail: large bed with red curtains and gold trim
dark wood paneling with ornate carvings

segments.scene_description: The agent walks through a narrow, warmly lit train corridor with dark wood paneling. A woman in a white dress walks ahead toward a luxurious bedroom area featuring a prominent red canopy bed with rose petals scattered on the sheets.

scene_state.functional_zone: train car bathroom with stained glass

events.description: entering the bathroom from the train bedroom corridor
turning around in the bathroom to examine fixtures before exiting

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom, examining the stained glass windows and fixtures, then turning to exit

entered.detail: art nouveau style stained glass with green and yellow floral pattern
white porcelain bathtub with silver fixtures

segments.scene_description: The agent enters a compact bathroom featuring an ornate stained glass window and a clawfoot bathtub. After briefly examining the space, the agent turns to exit back to the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: train corridor leading to exit door

events.description: exiting bathroom back into the main train corridor
approaching the exit door at the end of the train car

agents.ego_description: walking down the train corridor toward the exit door, passing windows and wall decorations

entered.detail: wooden door with glass panel leading outside

segments.scene_description: The agent walks down the carpeted train corridor, passing wall sconces and windows showing the night outside, heading toward the exit door at the end of the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorative garden with bamboo fencing and spherical lamps

events.description: exiting the train into the outdoor garden area
approaching and circling the ornate peacock throne chair

agents.ego_description: exploring the garden path, examining a decorative peacock chair, and continuing along the bamboo-lined walkway

notable_agents.action: stationary guard holding a glowing spherical lantern

entered.detail: tall bamboo poles forming garden walls
illuminated globe lights on stakes along the path
ornate circular bench with peacock feather design

segments.scene_description: The agent steps out of the train into a lush night garden illuminated by spherical lamps. The path is lined with bamboo fencing and dense vegetation. The agent approaches and circles an ornate peacock throne chair before continuing along the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor social gathering with food stalls and train car

events.description: entering the open garden area with crowd and food stall
moving through the crowd toward the parked train car

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded garden party area, passing by socializing guests and approaching a parked train car with a food stall

notable_agents.action: crowd of guests socializing near the food stall and train car

entered.detail: dark train car with lit windows and red awning
large building with arched glass windows

segments.scene_description: The agent emerges into a wide open garden area where a crowd of guests has gathered near a food stall. A parked train car with a red awning sits to the left, while a large glass greenhouse structure is visible in the background. The agent moves through the social gathering toward the train car.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, opulent interior of a luxury train into a sprawling, illuminated night garden. It begins in a warmly lit corridor with dark wood paneling, following a woman in a white dress toward a bedroom featuring a red canopy bed scattered with rose petals. The camera then pivots into a compact bathroom with a stained glass window and a clawfoot tub before retreating back into the carpeted hallway, passing wall sconces and night-view windows toward the exit. As the agent steps outside, the scene shifts to a lush garden where spherical lamps light a winding path lined with bamboo fencing and an ornate peacock throne. Finally, the environment opens into a wide social gathering near a food stall and a parked train car with a red awning, with a large glass greenhouse looming in the background.
